metadata.note: Fixture-scoped deck-roguelike encounter for Balance Telemetry Aggregation v1 (#1607). Plants a degenerate combo (smite 18 dmg + hex 15 dmg, both 1 energy: they dominate play-share and are co-played in every winning run) and a dead item (brick: costs 4, unaffordable with 3 energy, never played). strike is a normal card that is played but not flagged. Synthetic persona runs (#1606) over this scene produce a balance report that must flag the smite+hex combo and the dead brick.
